doc: Pure-TS port of MPFR's mpfr_set_inf: construct a signed-infinity MPFR at the requested precision. The immutable schema carries prec on Inf values (downstream ops read it; see mpfr_add(+Inf, x, prec, rnd) which uses the explicit prec). The C side accepts any int as sign with 'non-negative → +Inf' coercion; the TS surface restricts sign to 1|-1 strictly, same reasoning as set_zero.
divergence_from_c: C takes a pre-allocated mpfr_t (prec is implicit) and silently coerces non-negative to +Inf; TS takes prec as a positional bigint and a strict Sign (1|-1), throwing on anything else so the call site commits.
refs: mpfr/src/set_inf.c L24–L32 — the C reference: MPFR_SET_INF(x); if (sign >= 0) MPFR_SET_POS(x); else MPFR_SET_NEG(x).
